name: 0.25 MG Cabergoline Tablet IP
about: 0.25 MG Cabergoline Tablet IP is a general medicine that comes in the form of tablets. It is mainly used to treat high levels of prolactin hormone in the body which can cause various issues like infertility, irregular periods, and breast milk production. Each box of this medicine contains 1x4 tablets. The recommended dosage of the medicine should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. It is important to store the medicine in a dry and cool place to maintain its effectiveness. The medicine is manufactured in India and is available for export, supply, and trade.
